pageContext.name: Animus Kassandra
pageContext.description: 'If I was your punishment, you'd already be dead.' – Kassandra  Known as the Eagle Bearer and Misthios, Kassandra the deadly Spartan mercenary of Greece would not only hunt and eliminate her prey with ease but take on powerful organizations such as the Cult of Kosmos and the Order of the Ancients as well.  Sideshow and PureArts proudly present the Assassin's Creed: Animus Kassandra 1:4 Scale Statue – one of the most requested Animus statues by fans worldwide! This stunning collectible includes two head poses and an elaborate LED-lit base featuring a massive bronze statue of Athena crumbling into the signature Animus Transition effect!  Assassins Creed fans don't miss your chance to add this beautifully sculpted statue to your collection today!
